titleStmt.title: SII 26.550: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 550. (A.R. No. 520 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the same temple.

p.hi: Parākrama-pāṇḍyadēva: Ś. 1381 and 31+8th year, Mithuna (Āṉi) 23, su. 10, Wednesday, Svāti = 1461 A.D., June 17.

summary.p: The day in the month Mithuna was 21.

This inscription records an order of the king granting as sarvamānya maḍappuṟam, some land in Kaṟṟuchcheṟṟai-paṟṟu in Nallūr-paṟṟu in Teṉṉārināḍu, to Tattuvappirakāsaṉ, a maḍapati (religious teacher) residing in the Vitaraṇaviṉōdaṉ-perunteru on the western road, in lieu of his maḍappuṟam land in Pāgūr given to him by the king on a former occasion.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakābdam Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Eṇpattu Oṉṟiṉ meṟcellāniṉṟa namkumāraṉ Arikecari tevarāṉa parākkiṟama pāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 Etir 8 vatu mituṉa ñāyaṟṟu Irupattu mu
ṉṟāntiyatiyum pūṟuvapakṣattu deśamiyum(miyum) putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ nammolai vitiyil vitaraṇaviṉotaṉ perunteruvil maṭapatikaḷil tattuvap pirakāśaṉukku
muṉṉāḷ nām maṭappuṟamāka viṭṭukkallu veṭṭikkuṭuttavakaiyil pākūril viṭṭa nilam māṟikkoṇṭu nilamāka maṭappuṟamākaviṭṭa teṉṉārināṭṭu nallūṟpaṟṟil kaṟṟucceṟṟai
ppaṟṟukkup perunāṉkelkaiyāvatu kiḻellai Āṟṟukku(t) meṟku teṉellai cāttāviṉ nilattukku paṟṟukkum taṇṇampaikkum vaṭakku melellai puḷi yaṟaiyil Ellai
kkum peruvarampukkum kiḻakku vaṭaellai Āṟṟukkut teṟku Innāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nañcey puñcey paṭṭaṭai koṭi toṭṭam māvaṭai maravaṭai maṟṟum
nāṅkoḷḷum komuṟai pāṭu ḷum maṟṟum Eṟperpaṭṭa cuvantiraṅkaḷum Ilaikku sarvvamānyamāka maṭappiṟampāka Ācantratāram san=tati praveśamekaiya yāṇṭu koḷ
ḷavum Ādicaṇḍeśvaran Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 26.550 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
